scripts.build: pnpm --filter @detaches/shared build && pnpm --filter @detaches/server build && pnpm --filter @detaches/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @detaches/shared build && pnpm --filter @detaches/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @detaches/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @detaches/desktop build
scripts.release:win: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @detaches/openclaw-detaches-adapter test && pnpm --filter @detaches/server smoke && pnpm --filter @detaches/desktop package:win
